title: Array overrun in the skip-scan optimization
poc: SELECT i FROM t1 WHERE h=8;
key_bug_features: Array overrun in skip-scan logic during SQL execution
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, y TEXT NOT NULL, z REAL DEFAULT 0.0, w BLOB);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES(1, 'test', NULL, X'001122334455');
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE y IS NULL OR z > 0.0;
DELETE FROM t2 WHERE x IN (SELECT x FROM t2 WHERE y LIKE 't%');
